title: marksync.yml v1
description: Repository-owned MarkSync configuration. Source of truth for the config shape (GH-15 F-1 / blueprint §4). Validated by ajv at load time; mirrored by the TypeScript types in types.ts.

version.description: Schema version. v1 is the initial MS-0002 contract (forward-compatibility hook).

root.description: Corpus root directory (repo-relative, forward slashes) under which markdown sources live. Consumed by the intended-hierarchy step.

select.description: Glob patterns (micromatch-style) selecting files from the caller-supplied path list. Matched verbatim against repo-relative paths.

exclude.description: Glob patterns removing matched files from the selected set (applied after select).

hierarchy.description: Intended page-tree shape. mirror: derive parent dir from each file's path under root. flat: all pages under the single configured target parent.

targets.description: Target systems keyed by id. MS-0002 ships a single Confluence target.

type.description: Target system type. MS-0002 supports only Confluence Cloud.

parentPageId.description: Confluence parent page id under which mirrored pages attach.

granularity.description: Sync history granularity. MS-0002 accepts ONLY squash; commit-by-commit is deferred to a future milestone (ADR-0010 C-5 / DEC-2).

stalePlanMinutes.description: Plan freshness window in minutes (default: 15). Consumed by E3-S2/E3-S7.

policy.description: When to render Mermaid diagrams (default: render).

htmlLabels.description: Whether Mermaid may emit HTML labels (default: false for determinism).

deterministicIds.description: Whether Mermaid emits deterministic node ids (default: true, ADR-0002 C-1).

format.description: Page body representation (default: storage). Storage Format is the write target (ADR-0005).

visiblePanel.description: Whether the provenance panel is visible on published pages (default: true).
